name: Apple___Apple_scab
remedy: Apply protectant fungicides such as captan or mancozeb at green tip stage; use resistant cultivars; remove fallen leaf litter to reduce inoculum.

name: Apple___Black_rot
remedy: Prune and destroy infected tissues; apply fungicides like thiophanate-methyl or captan; maintain orchard sanitation.

name: Apple___Cedar_apple_rust
remedy: Apply fungicides such as myclobutanil during early season; remove nearby juniper hosts; plant resistant varieties.

name: Apple___healthy
remedy: Maintain balanced fertilization, proper pruning, and regular monitoring for early disease detection.

name: Blueberry___healthy
remedy: Maintain acidic soil pH (4.5–5.5), proper irrigation, and periodic nutrient management.

name: Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew
remedy: Apply sulfur or systemic fungicides like myclobutanil; ensure good canopy airflow and avoid excessive nitrogen fertilization.

name: Cherry_(including_sour)___healthy
remedy: Follow standard orchard practices including pruning, irrigation, and pest monitoring.

name: Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_spot
remedy: Use resistant hybrids; apply strobilurin or triazole fungicides; practice crop rotation and residue management.

name: Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_
remedy: Plant resistant hybrids; apply foliar fungicides such as azoxystrobin when disease pressure is high.

name: Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight
remedy: Use resistant varieties; apply fungicides like propiconazole; implement crop rotation.

name: Corn_(maize)___healthy
remedy: Ensure optimal fertilization, irrigation, and integrated pest management practices.

name: Grape___Black_rot
remedy: Apply fungicides such as mancozeb or myclobutanil; remove mummified berries; ensure proper canopy management.

name: Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles)
remedy: Remove and destroy infected vines; minimize pruning wounds; apply trunk protectants where applicable.

name: Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot)
remedy: Apply fungicides like copper-based compounds; remove infected foliage; improve air circulation.

name: Grape___healthy
remedy: Maintain canopy management, irrigation scheduling, and nutrient balance.

name: Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening)
remedy: Control vector (Asian citrus psyllid) using systemic insecticides like imidacloprid; remove infected trees; use certified disease-free planting material.

name: Peach___Bacterial_spot
remedy: Apply copper-based bactericides; use resistant cultivars; avoid overhead irrigation to reduce leaf wetness.

name: Peach___healthy
remedy: Maintain orchard sanitation, balanced nutrition, and routine pest scouting.

name: Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot
remedy: Apply copper bactericides with mancozeb; use disease-free seeds; practice crop rotation and avoid overhead irrigation.

name: Pepper,_bell___healthy
remedy: Ensure proper irrigation, fertilization, and pest monitoring.

name: Potato___Early_blight
remedy: Apply fungicides such as chlorothalonil or mancozeb; practice crop rotation; remove infected plant debris.

name: Potato___Late_blight
remedy: Apply systemic fungicides like metalaxyl or cyazofamid; destroy infected plants; avoid overhead irrigation.

name: Potato___healthy
remedy: Maintain proper soil health, irrigation, and nutrient management.

name: Raspberry___healthy
remedy: Follow proper pruning, irrigation, and integrated pest management practices.

name: Soybean___healthy
remedy: Maintain soil fertility, proper spacing, and monitor for pests and diseases.

name: Squash___Powdery_mildew
remedy: Apply fungicides such as sulfur or potassium bicarbonate; use resistant varieties; improve air circulation.

name: Strawberry___Leaf_scorch
remedy: Apply fungicides like captan; remove infected leaves; ensure proper spacing and airflow.

name: Strawberry___healthy
remedy: Maintain proper irrigation, mulching, and nutrient management.

name: Tomato___Bacterial_spot
remedy: Apply copper-based bactericides; use resistant varieties; avoid overhead irrigation.

name: Tomato___Early_blight
remedy: Apply fungicides such as chlorothalonil or mancozeb; remove infected leaves; practice crop rotation.

name: Tomato___Late_blight
remedy: Apply systemic fungicides like metalaxyl; remove infected plants; ensure proper drainage.

name: Tomato___Leaf_Mold
remedy: Apply fungicides like chlorothalonil; improve greenhouse ventilation and reduce humidity.

name: Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot
remedy: Apply fungicides such as mancozeb; remove infected leaves; avoid overhead irrigation.

name: Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider_mite
remedy: Apply acaricides like abamectin; introduce biological control agents (e.g., Phytoseiulus persimilis).

name: Tomato___Target_Spot
remedy: Apply fungicides such as azoxystrobin; remove infected plant debris; practice crop rotation.

name: Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus
remedy: Control whitefly vectors using insecticides like imidacloprid; remove infected plants; use resistant hybrids.

name: Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus
remedy: Remove infected plants; disinfect tools; avoid tobacco contamination; use resistant varieties.

name: Tomato___healthy
remedy: Maintain optimal irrigation, fertilization, and integrated pest management practices.
